LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS VITTORIO FRONCILLO AND GAROLD KHAZAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD, FIFTH, SIXTH, SEVENTH, TENTH, ELEVENTH AND TWELFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. OVERRULED AS TO THE FOURTH, EIGHTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION. FOR THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP WITH ITS INSURANCE AGENT DEFENDANT KHAZAN. (KOTLAR V. HARTFORD FIRE INS. CO. (2000) 83 CAL.APP.4TH 1116, 1123.) FOR THE SECOND, THIRD, FIFTH, SIXTH, SEVENTH, TENTH AND ELEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION, THE CLAIMS ARE PREEMPTED BY CIV. CODE 3426.7, SUBD. (B). THESE CLAIMS ARE 'BASED ON THE SAME NUCLEUS OF FACTS AS THE MISAPPROPRIATION OF TRADE SECRETS CLAIM FOR RELIEF." (K.C. MULTIMEDIA, INC. V. BANK OF AMERICA TECHNOLOGY & OPERATIONS, INC. (2009) 171 CAL.APP.4TH 939, 958.) WHERE BASED ON THE SAME NUCLEUS OF FACTS, PREEMPTION UNDER THIS STATUTE APPLIES TO BOTH UCL AND INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT CLAIMS. (ID. AT P. 960 - 962.) FOR THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE MISAPPROPRIATION OF TRADE SECRETS. (CACI NO. 4401.) THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. FOR THE EIGHTH AND NINTH CAUSES OF ACTION, DEFENDANTS WITHDRAW THEIR DEMURRER. (REPLY, P. 6:21-25.) FOR THE TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE A RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES OR OTHER CIRCUMSTANCES THAT REQUIRE AN ACCOUNTING IN EQUITY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA.

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTs INFINITE TRAVEL GROUP, LLC, FRANK DE-LEVY and YEVGENIY SAVITSKY's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled. Cross-Complainants have pled sufficient facts to allege defamation. (CACI no. 1704.) The falsity of the defamatory statement cannot be determined on the face of the Cross-Complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS VITTORIO FRONCILLO AND GAROLD KHAZAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained, with 10 days leave to amend, as to the first, second, third, fifth, sixth, seventh, tenth, eleventh and twelfth causes of action. Overruled as to the fourth, eighth and ninth causes of action. For the first cause of action, Plaintiff has not pled sufficient facts to allege a fiduciary relationship with its insurance agent Defendant Khazan. (Kotlar v. Hartford Fire Ins. Co. (2000) 83 Cal.App.4th 1116, 1123.) For the second, third, fifth, sixth, seventh, tenth and eleventh causes of action, the claims are preempted by Civ. Code 3426.7, subd. (b). These claims are 'based on the same nucleus of facts as the misappropriation of trade secrets claim for relief." (K.C. Multimedia, Inc. v. Bank of America Technology & Operations, Inc. (2009) 171 Cal.App.4th 939, 958.) Where based on the same nucleus of facts, preemption under this statute applies to both UCL and interference with contract claims. (Id. at p. 960 - 962.) For the fourth cause of action, Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to allege misappropriation of trade secrets. (CACI no. 4401.) The pleadings are not uncertain. For the eighth and ninth causes of action, Defendants withdraw their demurrer. (Reply, p. 6:21-25.) For the twelfth cause of action, Plaintiff has not pled sufficient facts to allege a relationship between the parties or other circumstances that require an accounting in equity. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-02-2014 Continued To Jan-30-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
